# The IronCub Company

> Official European dealer of compact machinery: mini skid steer loaders, remote control mowers, and Rippa mini excavators. Based in Middelharnis, Netherlands.

## About
The IronCub Company B.V. sells, rents, and services compact construction and landscaping machinery. We are the official Rippa Dealer Europe and carry IronCub branded loaders and mowers.

## Products
- [Mini Skid Steer Loaders](https://myironcub.com/verkoop.html#loaders): VTH 360, VTH 480W, VTH 480 Kubota, VTH 140, VTH 200, HTV 1000
- [Remote Control Mowers](https://myironcub.com/verkoop.html#grasmaaiers): Slope mowers for angles up to 55 degrees
- [Rippa Mini Excavators](https://myironcub.com/verkoop.html#rippa): R10 ECO, R10 Kubota, R13 PRO, R15 ECO, R18 PRO, R22 PRO, R32 PRO (1.0t to 3.4t)
- [Attachments](https://myironcub.com/verkoop.html#aanbouwdelen): Digging arms, mowers, rippers, bulldozers, and more
- [Merch](https://myironcub.com/verkoop.html#merch): IronCub Swing Collection clothing and accessories

## Services
- [Sales](https://myironcub.com/verkoop.html): Direct purchase with delivery to NL/BE/DE/FR/PT
- [Rental](https://myironcub.com/verhuur.html): Short and long-term machine rental
- [Lease](https://myironcub.com/lease.html): Operational and financial lease options
- [Service](https://myironcub.com/service.html): Maintenance, repairs, and parts
- [Demo Days](https://myironcub.com/demodagen.html): Every Friday in our showroom

## Contact
- Address: De Hofjes 44, 3241 ML Middelharnis, Netherlands
- Email: verkoop@ironcub.company
- Showroom: Tuesday open (no appointment), Friday DEMO Day
- [Make an appointment](https://myironcub.com/afspraak.html)
